description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metal head with a single broad cutting edge and a slightly tapered poll. The blade is thick and wedge-shaped, designed for splitting or chopping, with a matte black finish that suggests durability and heavy use. The handle is made of wood, displaying a natural grain and a gentle curve for ergonomic grip, with a slightly flared end to prevent slipping during use. The wood appears untreated or lightly finished, giving it a rustic, utilitarian appearance. The mounting of the blade to the handle is traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the top of the handle. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the blade or the handle.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a matte black metal blade and a curved wooden handle, designed for chopping or splitting tasks. The axe has a rustic, utilitarian look with no visible markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, wedge-shaped black blade.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thickness of the blade and the curvature of the handle, with the cutting edge facing forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's grain and the blade's poll, mirroring the overall profile seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the blade and the end of the handle, emphasizing the mounting and the handle's flare.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a natural grain, slightly flared at the end, oval cross-section, ergonomic for gripping.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped black steel blade with a broad cutting edge and a thick poll, no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the top of the wooden handle.
